evidence: "This movie handles death and relationships in a way that is so tender..."
"It's like Star Trek but with sex and Cosmopolitans."
"A bit of a muddle in the middle but divine in the end."
"Killing off characters that are so pivotal, coming up with plots which speak of universal human truths..."
"This movie pulls you in and grips you...but slowly."
"The cinematography, the sequencing, the actors; all brilliant."
"The entire cast is excellent, the writing superb..."
"Martin Scorcese hit it out of the park on this one."
"You could shut the sound off and still have enough to be seduced by."
"The intensity, the emotion conveyed by the leads as well as the secondaries is palpable."
"I laughed, I cried, and I cared for each and every one of these characters."
"This movie is beautifully made... hauntingly real and poignant."

summary: The user has a strong preference for emotionally resonant dramas and romances, often appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy slow-paced storytelling that evokes deep feelings and are particularly loyal to creators like Martin Scorsese.
